text:
{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"4","subject":"Build mobile app screens and UI components","description":"Create all Expo Router screens and UI components:

**Tab screens** (app/(tabs)/):
- _layout.tsx: Tab navigator with 4 tabs (홈, 사주, 궁합, 내 정보), dark theme styling
- index.tsx: Home - 오늘의 운세 card + quick action buttons
- saju.tsx: Saju hub - entry point to saju reading
- gunghap.tsx: Gunghap hub - entry point to compatibility reading
- profile.tsx: Profile - user info, saved persons management

**Stack screens**:
- app/saju/input.tsx: Birth date/time input form (date picker, time picker, gender, solar/lunar toggle, leap month)
- app/saju/result.tsx: Saju result display + AI interpretation streaming
- app/gunghap/input.tsx: Two person input for compatibility
- app/gunghap/result.tsx: Compatibility result display
- app/fortune/daily.tsx: Daily fortune detail

**Root layout** (app/_layout.tsx):
- Root Stack navigator
- Provider wrappers (SafeAreaProvider, etc.)

**UI Components** (src/components/ui/):
- Button.tsx: Styled button with variants
- Card.tsx: Dark theme card container
- Input.tsx: Styled text input
- DatePicker.tsx: Date/time picker wrapper

**Saju Components** (src/components/saju/):
- FourPillarsCard.tsx: 4-column visual layout of 사주팔자 (년주/월주/일주/시주)
- FiveElementsChart.tsx: 오행 distribution visualization
- StreamingText.tsx: AI interpretation with typing animation

**Gunghap Components** (src/components/gunghap/):
- CompatibilityScore.tsx: Animated score display

**Fortune Components** (src/components/fortune/):
- DailyFortuneCard.tsx: Daily fortune summary card

**Stores** (src/stores/):
- userStore.ts: User profile state (Zustand + MMKV persistence)
- sajuStore.ts: Saju calculation results cache
- appStore.ts: App settings

**Hooks** (src/hooks/):
- useSajuCalculation.ts: Calculate saju from input
- useInterpretation.ts: SSE streaming hook for AI interpretation

**API Client** (src/lib/api/):
- client.ts: HTTP client with SSE support for streaming
- interpretation.ts: API call wrappers for interpretation endpoints

**Styling**:
- Dark theme: bg-slate-900/950, text-amber-100/slate-100
- 오행 colors: 목=emerald, 화=rose, 토=amber, 금=slate-200, 수=blue
- Card-centric UI

Working directory: /Users/kangnam/projects/saju/
NOTE: Depends on Task 1 (project init). Should coordinate with Task 2 (saju engine) for types.","assignedBy":"frontend-dev","timestamp":"2026-02-28T06:01:54.479Z"}
